name: passbaton
display_name: passbaton — Session Continuity for Claude Code, Codex & Gemini
description: Zero-config session continuity and persistent memory for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, and Google Gemini CLI. Auto-injects your past context at session start, hands over state right before a compaction (carrying hot files + last build status), and saves what happened on exit — all to one local SQLite db shared across all three agents. 100% local, zero API cost. Every feature is opt-in via `passbaton config`. Includes 25 MCP tools for memory, task management, solution archive, and a knowledge graph, with multilingual semantic search across 94+ languages (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, on-device).

tools.name: session_start
tools.description: Load project context at session start. Returns tech stack, recent activity, pending tasks, and blockers (~650 tokens). Auto-invoked by SessionStart hook.

tools.name: session_end
tools.description: Save session state (summary, work done, next steps, modified files, blockers) to SQLite. Auto-restored by session_start in the next session.

tools.name: session_history
tools.description: Retrieve past session records chronologically. Returns summary, work done, files modified, and verification results per session.

tools.name: search_sessions
tools.description: Semantic search across session history using multilingual embeddings (94+ languages). Falls back to FTS5 keyword search.

tools.name: project_status
tools.description: Get project status: completion percentage, task breakdown, recent activity, and active blockers.

tools.name: project_init
tools.description: Initialize a new project. Auto-detects tech stack from package.json/pubspec.yaml/build.gradle. Idempotent.

tools.name: project_analyze
tools.description: Auto-detect project tech stack, framework, platform, directory structure, and dependencies by scanning files.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects with platform type, initialization status, and session context availability.

tools.name: task_add
tools.description: Add a task to a project backlog with priority ranking and file associations. Persisted in SQLite.

tools.name: task_update
tools.description: Update task status (pending/in_progress/done/blocked). Setting 'done' auto-records completion timestamp.

tools.name: task_list
tools.description: List project tasks filtered by status. Returns tasks with priority, related files, and status summary counts.

tools.name: task_suggest
tools.description: Scan source files for TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX comments and return as suggested tasks. Read-only.

tools.name: solution_record
tools.description: Record an error-solution pair. Associates error signature, fix description, and related files. Auto-indexed for FTS5.

tools.name: solution_find
tools.description: Search solution archive by error message/signature. Supports FTS5 keyword and semantic embedding search.

tools.name: solution_suggest
tools.description: AI-powered fix suggestions based on the solution archive. Retrieves relevant past solutions and generates recommendations.

tools.name: verify_build
tools.description: Run project build command (auto-detected per platform). Executes with 5-minute timeout. Returns success/output.

tools.name: verify_test
tools.description: Run project test suite (auto-detected per platform). Optionally scope to specific test path. 5-minute timeout.

tools.name: verify_all
tools.description: Run build + test + lint sequentially. Returns per-gate results and overall pass/fail. Quality gate for commits.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store typed knowledge (observation/decision/learning/error/pattern) with tags and importance. Auto-generates vector embedding.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search memories via FTS5 or semantic embeddings. Compact index mode by default (saves tokens). Filterable by type/project/tags.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve full memory content by ID array (max 20). Follow-up to memory_search for loading complete details.

tools.name: memory_related
tools.description: Find related memories via knowledge graph edges and/or semantic similarity. Combines graph traversal with cosine similarity.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: Aggregate memory statistics: total count, breakdown by type/project, top accessed, and most recent entries.

tools.name: graph_connect
tools.description: Create a directed edge between memories. 7 relation types: related_to, causes, solves, depends_on, contradicts, extends, example_of.

tools.name: graph_explore
tools.description: Depth-first traversal of the knowledge graph from a starting memory. Configurable depth (1-4), relation filter, and direction.
